---
title: "Reproducing figure 5a"
author: "Harchit Kaur"
date: today 
project: 
  output-dir: Output
  execute-dir: project
toc: true 
format: 
  html: 
    embed-resources: true
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
editor: visual 
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
execute:
  warning: false 
  message: false
  freeze: false 
---

## Prepare Session

```{r}
#| label: libraries and data import 
#| echo: false


library(ROCR)
#library(MetaIntegrator)
library(ggplot2)
library(parallel)
library(OptimalCutpoints)
library(data.table)
library(xgboost)
library(caret)
library(dplyr)
library(pROC)


df <- read.csv("Data/processed/41698_2025_1043_MOESM3_ESM.csv")

```

```{r}
#| label: clean dataset

#create outcome variable y
df$y <- ifelse(df$group == "lung cancer", 1, 0)

#clean smoking variable 
df$smoking_binary <- ifelse(df$smokingstatus == "never", 0, 1)

#compute AUC function 

get_auc <- function(pred, truth) {
  roc_obj <- roc(truth, pred)
  
  auc_val <- as.numeric(auc(roc_obj))
  ci_vals <- ci.auc(roc_obj)
  
  data.frame(
    auc = auc_val,
    lower_ci = ci_vals[1],
    upper_ci = ci_vals[3]
  )
}
```

## Fit models

```{r}
#| label: build models

m1 <- glm(y ~ luncancerscore, data = df, family = "binomial")
p1 <- predict(m1, type = "response")
r1 <- get_auc(p1, df$y)
r1$model <- "lung cancer score"

m2 <- glm(y ~ age, data = df, family = "binomial")
p2 <- predict(m2, type = "response")
r2 <- get_auc(p2, df$y)
r2$model <- "age"


m3 <- glm(y ~ smoking_binary, data = df, family = "binomial")
p3 <- predict(m3, type = "response")
r3 <- get_auc(p3, df$y)
r3$model <- "smoking"


m4 <- glm(y ~ age + smoking_binary, data = df, family = "binomial")
p4 <- predict(m4, type = "response")
r4 <- get_auc(p4, df$y)
r4$model <- "age + smoking"

m5 <- glm(y ~ luncancerscore + age + smoking_binary, data = df, family = "binomial")
p5 <- predict(m5, type = "response")
r5 <- get_auc(p5, df$y)
r5$model <- "lung cancer score + age + smoking"


results <- bind_rows(r1, r2, r3, r4, r5)
results$method <- "logistic regression"



```

Reproduce Figure 5A

```{r}
#| label: pre-plot with logistic regression

results$model <- factor(results$model, levels = c(
  "lung cancer score",
  "age",
  "smoking",
  "age + smoking",
  "lung cancer score + age + smoking"
))

ggplot(results, aes(x = auc, y = model)) +
  
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lower_ci, xmax = upper_ci), height = 0.2) +
  
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(0.6, 0.7, 0.8, 0.9),
             linetype = "dashed", color = "grey70") +
  
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(levels(results$model))) +
  
  labs(
    title = "AUC of lung cancer vs control/benign (validation UK)",
    x = "AUC",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  
  xlim(0.55, 0.9) +
  
  theme_minimal()
```
